name: pubg
description: PUBG Mobile — 90fps Smooth Extreme, ROG Phone 9 Pro spoof
notes: PUBG Mobile allows 90fps on ROG Phone 9 Pro at Smooth + Extreme setting.
For 120fps: PUBG's 120fps mode is available on ROG 9 Pro but requires
the 120fps option to appear in-game settings after first launch.
Set target_fps to 120 and fps_cap_mode to precise for that.
